content_blocks.stitching_note: Continuation of clause 3, completing the definition list.

content_blocks.text: (গ) Article No. 62 এর বিপরীতে column (2) এর EXEMPTIONS এর আগতায়ীন—
(অ) paragraph (1) এর শেষে সেমিকোলন (;) চিহ্নটি সন্নিবেশিত হইবে;

output_carry_forward_state.active_clause_summary: Amends Article No. 62 by inserting a semicolon at the end of paragraph (1) and detailing subsequent changes.
output_carry_forward_state.continuation_hint_for_next_chunk: The next chunk contains further amendments (Article No. 64) which should be treated as a continuation of the amendment process.

recent_clause_history.summary: Amends section 2 of the Stamp Act, 1899, defining 'Power of Attorney'.
Amends Schedule I and Article No. 48 of the Stamp Act, 1899.
